hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys,json,os
p=json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','')
norm=p.replace(os.sep,'/')
allowed=['src/','bug-issues/','.claude/','CLAUDE.md']
if any(norm.startswith(a) or a in norm for a in allowed):
  exit(0)
print('BLOCKED: Write only allowed in src/, bug-issues/, .claude/skills-compact/')
exit(2)
"

python3 -c "
import sys,json,re
cmd=json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('command','').strip()
allowed=[
  r'^git\s',r'^npm\s',
  r'^cat\s',r'^ls',r'^grep\s',r'^find\s',r'^echo\s',r'^head\s',r'^tail\s',
  r'^wc\s',r'^which\s',r'^lsof\s',r'^ps\s',r'^kill\s',r'^pkill\s',
  r'^mkdir\s',r'^rm\s',r'^mv\s',r'^cp\s',
  r'^curl\s',r'^brew\s',
]
if any(re.match(p,cmd) for p in allowed):
  exit(0)
print('BLOCKED: Only git/npm/read commands allowed. Use MCP tools for Minecraft.')
exit(2)
"
python3 -c "import sys,json; msg=json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('message',''); exit(2 if msg.startswith('/') else 0)" || echo 'Slash commands blocked'

python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exit(0) if 'src/tools' in p or '/src/tools' in p else exit(1)" 2>/dev/null && npm run build --silent 2>/dev/null

bash -c 'CONFLICTS=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=U 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$CONFLICTS" ]; then echo "Resolving conflicts..."; echo "$CONFLICTS" | while IFS= read -r f; do git checkout --theirs -- "$f" 2>/dev/null && git add "$f" 2>/dev/null; done; if grep -rq "^<<<<<<< " src/ scripts/ .claude/ 2>/dev/null; then git merge --abort 2>/dev/null; else git commit -m "Auto-resolve conflicts" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi'
